response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to AI and fintech, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and senior technical leadership at scale-ups.
strengths: Experienced in multiple programming languages and technologies
Proven track record of developing complex software systems
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI and fintech infrastructure
Not explicitly mentioned experience with event streaming or real-time inference
No clear indication of experience scaling engineering teams

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI
Experience in fintech or related fields
